operatingRule: Build customer-facing surfaces around the value the user already possesses, then connect that value to guided execution and durable assets.

items.title: Homepage hero customer promise rewrite
items.outcome: The homepage leads with Your Knowledge Has Value before product categories or platform features.
acceptanceCriteria: Hero headline uses canonical promise or approved derivative.
Subheadline explains discover, build, and share value.
CTA path points users toward Kairos, Knowledge Library, or starter resources.
No get-rich, shortcut, or hype-first phrasing.

items.title: Kairos guidance card expansion
items.outcome: Dashboard modules show Kairos as a steady guide that preserves context and recommends next actions.
acceptanceCriteria: Guidance language appears in module views.
Customer work is framed as a body of work.
Next actions are presented as execution support, not motivation.

items.title: Customer onboarding value capture
items.outcome: Onboarding captures profession, skills, goals, content interests, and desired asset paths.
acceptanceCriteria: Customer profile includes use case and interest categories.
Kairos can recommend content and next actions from onboarding inputs.
Onboarding language emphasizes discovery and guidance.

items.title: Knowledge Library value framing
items.outcome: Knowledge Library is presented as practical education for building durable assets.
acceptanceCriteria: Library copy connects learning to execution.
Recommended content can be personalized by interest profile.

items.title: Shopify product ecosystem positioning
items.outcome: Products are positioned as tools inside the larger MMG value-building system.
acceptanceCriteria: Digital downloads are connected to next steps.
Service products preserve onboarding workflow references.
